translated: And he moved from there to the mountain on the east of Bethel, and he pitched his tent, with Bethel on the west and Ai on the east; and there he built an altar to the Lord and called upon the name of the Lord.

translated: And I will give you a new heart, and put a new spirit in you; I will remove from you your heart of stone and give you a heart of flesh, and you will be my people and I will be your God; and you will keep my commandments and do them and you will be my people.

translated: Esau asked his father for food, and he said to him, "What is this that you have hunted so quickly?" Jacob replied, "Because the Lord your God brought it to me."

translated: The old man asked the elder, "How is it that you have lived long and your body is still strong?" The elder replied, "It is because I am patient." And Rebekah kept these words in her heart.

translated: Then he gave them his blessing and said, "May the God before whom my fathers Abraham and Isaac walked faithfully, the God who has been my shepherd all my life to this day, the Angel who has delivered me from all harm —may he bless these boys."

translated: And he said to them, "I will go to my father's house and tell my father's elder, so that he will ask for a wife for me."

ref: and I'll ask one of them for a drink. If she gives me a drink and then offers to get some water for my camels, I'll know she is the one you have chosen and that you have kept your promise to my master.
text: Kɛl ka m ya'a yɛl bipuŋ sɔ' ye, ‘M bɛlimnɛ, tisim ku'om nɛ nwam ka m nu, ka o na yɛl ye, “Di'em nu, ka kɛ ka m tisi fʋ yʋgʋma la ka ba nu mɛn.” Kɛl ka bipuŋ kan na an onɛ ka fʋ gaŋ ye fʋ tisi fʋ tʋmtʋm Isaak. Nɛ' ka m na baŋ ye fʋ pa'ali fʋ nɔŋilim nɛ m zugdaan la.’”
translated: The angel of the Lord called to Abraham from heaven a second time and said, "I swear by myself, declares the Lord, that because you have done this and have not withheld your son, your only son, I will surely bless you and make your descendants as numerous as the stars in the sky and as the sand on the seashore."

ref: Afterwards, Jacob went back and spent the rest of the night alone. A man came and fought with Jacob until just before daybreak.
